title: Fix chicken taco image and restore salsa/chips and quesadilla images

requirements.summary: Replace the current chicken taco images in the MenuSection with correct images that clearly show chicken tacos with visible grilled/seasoned chicken as the filling
acceptanceCriteria: The chicken taco menu card displays an image that clearly shows chicken tacos with chicken as the primary visible filling
The image is distinct from beef/street taco imagery used elsewhere on the site

file_operations.description: Update the chicken taco menu card image reference to use the generated chicken-tacos.dim_800x600.png asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/chicken-tacos.dim_800x600.png. Replace any existing taco image reference for the chicken taco card with this authentic chicken taco image showing grilled seasoned chicken filling.

requirements.summary: Restore the salsa and chips menu item image in the MenuSection that was present in a previous version
acceptanceCriteria: The chips & salsa menu card displays an appealing image of salsa and tortilla chips
The image is visible and properly sized within the menu card grid

file_operations.description: Update the chips & salsa menu card image reference to use the generated chips-salsa.dim_800x600.png asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/chips-salsa.dim_800x600.png. Ensure the image is properly displayed within the menu card structure.

requirements.summary: Restore the quesadilla menu item image in the MenuSection that was present in a previous version
acceptanceCriteria: The quesadilla menu card displays an appealing image of a quesadilla
The image is visible and properly sized within the menu card grid

file_operations.description: Update the quesadilla menu card image reference to use the generated quesadilla.dim_800x600.png asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/quesadilla.dim_800x600.png. Ensure the image is properly displayed within the menu card structure showing the golden crispy quesadilla with visible cheese and chicken filling.

requirements.summary: Retain the new catering section banner image at the bottom of the website and do not revert or replace this image
acceptanceCriteria: The CateringSection at the bottom of the page continues to display the new catering banner image introduced in Version 19
The increased height classes (h-96 sm:h-[32rem]) on the banner image container remain unchanged

file_operations.description: Verify that the CateringSection banner image container retains the increased height classes (h-96 sm:h-[32rem]) and continues to display the current catering banner image. Do not modify the image source or height classes. This is a verification-only operation to ensure no accidental reversion occurs during the menu image updates.
